Entries.AnnetteHouse_Ready: Hello @,^Thank you so much for the materials! The townhall house is finally renovated. You can come visit anytime!^  - Annette
Entries.MoonInn_Ready: Hello @,^The Moon Inn is looking as good as new! We couldn't have done it without your help. Drop by when you have time!^  - Annette
Entries.SpiritHealer_Ready: Greetings @,^The materials were perfect. The Spirit Healer's house has been restored to its former glory. Thank you for your kindness.^  - Annette
Entries.HerbalistHouse_Ready: Hello @,^The Herbalist House is ready! The herbs are already starting to grow back. Come take a look when you have time.^  - Annette
Entries.MoonGranary_Ready: Hello @,^The old Granary is fully repaired and ready to store our harvests. Your help means the world to Moonvillage!^  - Annette
Entries.LorilaiBedroom_Ready: Hi @!^The bedroom is finally finished. It looks so cozy now! Feel free to stop by and see it.^  - Lorilai
Entries.MoonGrocery_Ready: Hello @,^The Moon Grocery Store is open for business again! Come by and check out the new stock.^  - Annette
